# M5 Interior Design & Build · Miami

> M5 is an interior design and turnkey renovation studio in Miami, Florida. One accountable team covers design, permits, construction and decorative plaster finishes, with transparent itemized budgets and a 1-year written warranty. Languages: English, Spanish, Ukrainian.

## What M5 does

- Interior design: concept, layouts, photoreal 3D visualization, materials and documentation — from $6 / sq ft
- Turnkey renovation: demolition to décor under one contract, fixed-scope pricing, weekly photo updates — from $145 / sq ft
- Decorative plaster: Venetian plaster, microcement, limewash; own sample library — from $18 / sq ft, projects from $2K
- Construction & villas: full-cycle build with licensed Florida GC, Miami-Dade permits, HVHZ impact standards — from $390 / sq ft
- Technical supervision: on-site quality checks, contractor oversight, punch-list control — from 4% of budget

## Key facts

- Turnkey design + renovation projects start around $130K; typical timeline up to 3 months
- M5 handles Miami-Dade permits, condo board approvals, COI, elevator bookings and noise-hour rules
- 1-year written warranty on every build
- Service area: Miami, Miami Beach, Brickell, Edgewater, Coral Gables, Sunny Isles Beach, Wynwood

## Resources

- [Homepage](https://m5miami.com/): services, process, portfolio, FAQ
- [2026 Miami Renovation Cost Guide (free PDF)](https://m5miami.com/guide/m5-miami-renovation-cost-guide-2026.pdf): real $/sq ft ranges, condo rules, planning checklist
- [Portfolio](https://m5miami.com/portfolio/): completed projects with budgets and timelines
- [Privacy Policy](https://m5miami.com/privacy/)
